summary: Client Portal Bug Fixes Testing Complete - All 6 bugs verified fixed. Fixed one remaining issue: doc.file_id→doc.id in My Documents table download button (line 809).

backend_tests.login_all_roles: PASSED - Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client all login successfully
backend_tests.tickets_my_tickets_endpoint: PASSED - GET /api/tickets/my-tickets returns 200 with created_by_name and created_by_role fields
backend_tests.ticket_detail_endpoint: PASSED - GET /api/tickets/{id} returns created_by_name, created_by_role, and messages with user_name/user_role
backend_tests.documents_endpoint: PASSED - GET /api/documents/case/{id} returns documents with 'id' and 'uploaded_at' fields

frontend_tests.client_login: PASSED - Login works, redirects to /client dashboard
frontend_tests.my_documents_tab: PASSED - Shows documents table with proper dates (4/3/2026), no 'Invalid Date'
frontend_tests.document_download: PASSED - Download button works, file downloads successfully
frontend_tests.support_tab_tickets: PASSED - Tickets load via /api/tickets/my-tickets, shows 6 tickets
frontend_tests.ticket_detail_view: PASSED - Shows 'Created by: Case Manager (case_manager)' with name and role
frontend_tests.resolution_note_ux: PASSED - Clicking Resolve without note shows error toast and focuses input
frontend_tests.my_info_tab: PASSED - Shows information sheet data (Full Name, Nationality, Phone, Email, etc.)
frontend_tests.ticket_creation: PASSED - New ticket created and appears in list immediately

bugs_verified_fixed: Bug 1: doc.file_id→doc.id for downloads - FIXED (line 737 uses doc.id, fixed line 809 to also use doc.id)
Bug 2: doc.upload_date→doc.uploaded_at for dates - FIXED (line 794 uses doc.uploaded_at)
Bug 3: /api/tickets/my-tickets endpoint 404 - FIXED (endpoint exists and returns tickets)
Bug 4: created_by_name/created_by_role fields in tickets - FIXED (all ticket endpoints return these fields)
Bug 5: Resolution note UX - FIXED (shows error toast, focuses input, scrolls to field)
Bug 6: My Info tab visibility - FIXED (shows information sheet data or empty state message)

fix_applied_by_testing_agent.change: Changed doc.file_id to doc.id in My Documents table download button
fix_applied_by_testing_agent.reason: API returns 'id' field, not 'file_id'. Line 737 was already fixed but line 809 was missed.

seed_data_creation: Created test ticket 'TEST Ticket from Playwright' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 Client Portal bugs from user screenshots have been verified fixed: (1) Document downloads use doc.id, (2) Date formatting uses doc.uploaded_at, (3) /api/tickets/my-tickets endpoint works, (4) Ticket endpoints return created_by_name/created_by_role and messages have user_name/user_role, (5) Resolution note UX shows error and focuses input, (6) My Info tab shows information sheet. Testing agent fixed one remaining issue: line 809 in ClientDashboard.jsx still used doc.file_id instead of doc.id.
